claimBoundary: Open-loop Poisson arrivals generated by pgbench against the same durable mixed spatial workload. Passing means no database transaction failure, a skipped-arrival rate within the declared admission budget, and observed completion p99 at or below the stated latency limit on the reported host. It is not a universal SLA.

dataset.name: NOAA IBTrACS v04r01 since1980 list CSV
